title: Singapore's UMAMI Bioworks to introduce sustainable cultivated caviar
description: Plus, Perkins Coie highlights key food regulatory issues under President Trump’s FDA and USDA, Heura Foods expands innovation capabilities with new lab and patents, Angel Yeast expands yeast protein production, and more!
author: Futureofproteinproduction

title: The Netherlands prioritizes sustainable food with new scale-up facilities
description: Plus, European Investment Bank backs Formo with €35 million loan to scale up animal-free cheese production, Lantmännen invests in yellow pea processing plant, The Good Food Institute Europe awards research grants, and more!
author: Futureofproteinproduction

title: Gavan raises US$8 million to launch European facility for plant-based fat solution
description: Plus, PoLoPo expands molecular farming operations, Kern Tec and BettaF!sh earn top honors in EIT Food’s Marketed Innovation Prize 2024, Oatly loses court battle with Dairy UK over ‘Post Milk Generation’ trademark, and more!
author: Futureofproteinproduction

title: Multus launches animal component-free cell culture media
description: Plus, the United States is witnessing a potential paradigm shift in nutritional policy, Aleph Farms' strategic move to file its cultivated meat regulatory application in Thailand, and more!
author: Futureofproteinproduction

title: The Cultured Hub opens in Switzerland
description: Plus, GFI Europe urges new European Commission to focus on protein diversification, Mushroom protein pioneer, Ramkumar Nair, to launch a fresh venture, National Alternative Protein Innovation Centre launches at the University of Leeds, and more!
author: Futureofproteinproduction
